name: Loot Legacy
author: Poki
description: Loot Legacy is a clicker game that takes you on a thrilling adventure, battling wave after wave of monstrous foes! Armed with nothing but your bare hands, you’ll need to fight and slay all sorts of creatures to survive. As you progress, collect special items to boost your damage and earn points to level up your stats. Don’t let defeat get you down—each loss is just a step toward becoming stronger. Keep upgrading, explore new maps, and prepare for your next challenge. It’s your time to rise from the darkness and fight for the light! How to play Loot Legacy? Click or tap to cause damage Who created Loot Legacy? Loot Legacy is created by Moodneys. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Loot Legacy for free? You can play Loot Legacy for free on Poki. Can I play Loot Legacy on mobile devices and desktop? Loot Legacy can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
